16.output: The track 'Vocalized Riff' seems to be a collection of non-standard, possibly improvised guitar riffs, hence the lack of a definitive melody. The execution appears more raw and free-form than typical song structures, suggesting an element of improvisation. Based on this, I would classify it as 'AI-generated' due to its atypical structure and style, though the creativity aspect might make it resonate with some humans as 'human-authored'.
